short_summary: War ongoing; Iran deal diversion risk
rationale: Active war continues at maximum background; US-Iran deal momentum persists as a diversion risk from Western focus on Ukraine; Lebanon fighting signals continued regional instability.

top_events.title: US and Iran say deal is close; Trump seeks off-ramp
top_events.summary: US diplomatic energy focused on Iran deal risks diverting attention and resources from Ukraine; no qualitative change but sustained pressure on Western prioritization.

top_events.title: Lebanon fighting continues despite Iran deal talks
top_events.summary: Israel continues strikes on south Lebanon; ongoing Middle East conflict competes with Ukraine for Western political bandwidth and aid resources.

top_events.title: 117 million people displaced worldwide
top_events.summary: Global displacement record includes Ukraine war victims; highlights scale of crisis but no new policy response for Ukraine specifically.
